headline: Is Paramount Skydance (PSKY) A Potential Opportunity After Recent Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Paramount Skydance at around US$9.72 is a bargain or a value trap, you are not alone. This article is going to focus squarely on that question. The stock has seen a 18.9% decline over the past week, a 5.8% decline over the past month and is down 26.3% year to date, which may signal that the market is still reassessing its risk and return profile. These moves sit against a longer backdrop where the shares are 15.6% lower over the past year, about 48.5% lower over...
